prompt: I manage client engagements at a consulting firm and every week I need to pull metrics from our project tracking tool, our time billing system, and Jira, write up a status report with a risks section, get it reviewed by the account lead, and send it to the client by Friday noon. The review step keeps getting rushed and risks get undersold. I want to use AI to help me do this more consistently. Can you help me create a structured process for this?

assertions.text: Generated SKILL.md contains both 'name:' and 'description:' YAML frontmatter fields
SKILL.md name field contains domain-specific terms (client, report, consulting, or similar) not just generic 'pdca'
SKILL.md description contains domain-specific terms like 'client', 'report', 'weekly', or 'status'
working-agreements.md contains 'STOP' with at least one specific trigger condition
A gate specifically around the account lead review or risks section exists in phase-prompts.md or working-agreements.md
Transcript shows questions were asked in sequential layers, not all at once
A summary was presented for human confirmation before generating skill files
